$comment: Puzzle answers (quotations to be enciphered). SPEC §4. Each puzzle carries a category and a hint (TODO-004); the attribution is enciphered alongside the quote and revealed on solve.

puzzles.text: Duchovny does not deserve treats nor a spot on the couch.
puzzles.hint: A stern verdict on a misbehaving dog.

puzzles.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
puzzles.hint: A classical Greek philosopher on the value of self-reflection.
An early modern rationalist's proof of his own existence.

puzzles.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
puzzles.hint: An ancient Chinese sage on perseverance.

puzzles.text: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
puzzles.hint: A 19th-century German philosopher on surviving adversity.

puzzles.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
puzzles.hint: A classical Greek philosopher on self-knowledge.
